allow: Bash(node -e "const db = require\('better-sqlite3'\)\('planmarket.db'\); try { console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM bookings LIMIT 1'\).get\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); } try { console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM stalls LIMIT 1'\).get\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); } try { console.log\(db.prepare\('SELECT * FROM markets LIMIT 1'\).get\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\(e.message\); }")
